titleStmt.title: SII 29.96: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 96. (A.R. No. B. 761 of 1962-63.) GORṬA, BHALKI TALUK, BIDAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab built into the courtyard of the house of Prayāgabāyi Nāgappa Hāḷuṁbare.

The top portion of this slab is broken and lost. As a result information regarding the king and the family to which he belonged, are lost. However, the date of the record indicates that it belonged to the reign period of Sōmēśvara III.

It registers gifts of lands for worship and offerings to god and burning of a perpetual lamp in the temple of god Mallēśvara situated near the temple of Nagarēśvara in Goranṭe, a sarvanamasyadagrahāra, by the mahājanas of that place. The record has eulogized the qualities of mahājanas. It also registers a gift of a garden to the same deity by Pullavaḍugara Māyipayyanāyaka and [Ra]yiṇa-nāyaka probably on the same date.
The record is dated in Chālukya Vikrama year [5]3, Kīlaka, Pushya śu. 1, Monday, uttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti. It corresponds to 1128 A.D., December 24, Monday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
niyama svādhyāya dhyānadhāraṇa maunānuṣṭhāṇa japasamādhi
śīḷa saṁpannaru nuḍidumattennaru yajana yājanādi śaṭkarmanira
taru śaṭtarkka ṣaṇmukhōpamāna pratyakṣa nārāyaṇarumappa śrīmat sarvva
namasyadagrahāraṁ gōraṁṭeyaśēśa mahājanaṁgaḷu © śvasti sama
ṇagaṇa mahāratnāḷaṁkrita śarīraruṁ kuḷakamaḷa vikaśita
raruṁ satyaśaucācāra cāritra cāturyya sauṁdaryya vi
sarōvara rājahaṁsaruṁ śivaguru pādāṁbhōja mattamadu
du madhuravacana racanarumappa śrī madgōraṁṭeya śē
raṁgaḷu nagarēśvaradēvara samopadalli varaputra sthānamappa
ṭṭeya mallēśvaradēvarige . goydēśvara tōṭadiṁ teṁkalu Ā
ra tōṭadiṁ baḍaga biṭṭa mattaru Oṁdu . mattaṟa 60 ṟoḷagaṇa Ujjaḷeya
nāyakana vrittigaḷaṁ māṟugoṁḍu dēvara Aṁgabhōga nivēdyaṁ dīvige
Eṇnegaṁ pūjisuva jīyarakkapparakā nakku biṭṭa vritti mūṟu ma
ttaṁ . svasti samasta guṇasaṁpannarappa śrīmat pullavaḍugara māyi
payya nāyakanuṁ rāyiṇa nāykanuṁ niḻdu dēvara tōṁṭada hāḷeya
vaṁ biṭṭaru mattaṁ . svasti śrīmaccāḷukya vikrama varśada 53 neya kīlaka saṁvatsa
rada puṣya suddha pāḍiva sōmavāra Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁtiyaṁdu biṭṭaru
letters worn out
dammavaṁ pratipāḷisidaḍe kurukṣētra vāraṇāsiyalu sāyira kavileyaṁ
suvarṇṇa berasi vēda pāragataru sāsira brāhmaṇarige koṭṭa phala keḍisidavara
mitraroḷagāgi Āṟūra narakakkiḷiva kurukṣētra vāraṇāśiyalu sāyi
ra kavilevaṁ sāyira brāhmaṇaruvaṁ koṁda pātakanakku . svadattaṁ parada
ttaṁ vāyō harētu vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭirvarśa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
ditadoḷiṁtī dharmmavanu ridisaleṁdu bagedaṁdava saṁsuttida ku barvallaṁ ka
nisade rauravakke saṁdāga da niḍigeṁ .
Digital edition of SII 29.96 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
